ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Continued To Oct-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Pelavin appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court informed Mr. Pelavin that it needs a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration, and reminded Counsel that this date was set at the time of appointment of his Client. Mr. Pelavin stated that he should be able to get a petition filed within the next few weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to October 21, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
